mapper.sql: id, code, name, type, bankInfo, bankAccount, cnapsCode, contacts, tel, email, state, needApprove, approveStatus, deliveryIds, relateType, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_facilitator (code, name, type, bankInfo, bankAccount, cnapsCode, contacts, tel, email, state, needApprove, approveStatus, deliveryIds, relateType, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime) values (#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cnapsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contacts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, #{needApprove,jdbcType=BIT}, #{approveStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deliveryIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relateType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

update pm_facilitator
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bankInfo = #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bankAccount = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cnapsCode = #{cnapsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contacts = #{contacts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT},
needApprove = #{needApprove,jdbcType=BIT},
approveStatus = #{approveStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
deliveryIds = #{deliveryIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
relateType = #{relateType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_facilitator set code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bankInfo = #{bankInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bankAccount = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cnapsCode = #{cnapsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contacts = #{contacts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, needApprove = #{needApprove,jdbcType=BIT}, approveStatus = #{approveStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deliveryIds = #{deliveryIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relateType = #{relateType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from pm_facilitator
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
code = #{model.code, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
bankInfo = #{model.bankInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
bankAccount = #{model.bankAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cnapsCode = #{model.cnapsCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
contacts = #{model.contacts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{model.tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
needApprove = #{model.needApprove, jdbcType=BIT} AND
approveStatus = #{model.approveStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
deliveryIds = #{model.deliveryIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
relateType = #{model.relateType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( code like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or type like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankAccount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cnapsCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or contacts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or deliveryIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or relateType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_facilitator
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
code = #{model.code, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
name = #{model.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
type = #{model.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
bankInfo = #{model.bankInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
bankAccount = #{model.bankAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cnapsCode = #{model.cnapsCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
contacts = #{model.contacts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{model.tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
needApprove = #{model.needApprove, jdbcType=BIT} AND
approveStatus = #{model.approveStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
deliveryIds = #{model.deliveryIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
relateType = #{model.relateType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( code like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or type like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or bankAccount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cnapsCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or contacts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or deliveryIds like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or relateType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
